name.en: Fire safety symbols for fire brigade plans (DIN 14034-6)

description.en: Symbols commonly used on German fire brigade plans (DIN 14095) and fire protection drawings.
description.de: Gängige Symbole für Feuerwehrpläne (DIN 14095) und Brandschutzpläne.
description.nl: Gangbare symbolen op Duitse Feuerwehrpläne (DIN 14095) en brandveiligheidstekeningen.
